top_signals.title: DHS, DOT partner to investigate 75 CDL training schools suspected of fraud
top_signals.summary:
The Department of Homeland Security announced a partnership with the Department of Transportation after FMCSA identified approximately 75 CDL schools suspected of fraudulent activities.

The post DHS, DOT partner to investigate 75 CDL training schools suspected of fraud appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Seven & i shares jump 3% on report of stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
top_signals.summary: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped after a report said the company was looking to buy a stake in Poland's Zabka Group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
